user_feedback: can you make it so that the bubbles aren't so directly close to red line, perhaps you and increase the gap and even increase the canvas size height so that the gap between the red line and the bubbles is wider, and can you get rid of the timer component, just limit only the number of shots I can make, and make sure its lenient
analysis:
- Issue identified: The user requested three main changes: 1) Increase the gap between bubbles and the lose line, 2) Increase the canvas height to support this gap, and 3) Replace the timer mechanic with a lenient shot limit mechanic.
- Files affected: `index.html`, `globals.js`, `levels.js`, `game.js`, `ui.js`, `input.js`.
- Changes needed:
    - `index.html`: Update CSS to increase canvas height to 600px and update game description.
    - `globals.js`: Update `CANVAS_HEIGHT` to 600, adjust `SHOOTER_Y` and `LOSE_LINE_Y` to maintain relative positions at the bottom, and replace `timerRemaining` with `shotsRemaining` in `gameState`.
    - `levels.js`: Replace `getLevelTimeLimit` with `getLevelShotLimit` (providing lenient shot counts), remove `updateTimer`, and change bonus calculation to use shots.
    - `game.js`: Remove timer logic, add a lose condition for running out of shots (when grid is stable), and handle shot bonuses.
    - `ui.js`: Update HUD to show "SHOTS" instead of "TIME", and update start/game over screens.
    - `input.js`: Decrement `shotsRemaining` when firing and prevent firing if no shots remain.
